title: Fibonacci Sum
description: Given an integer n, compute the sum of the first n Fibonacci numbers. The Fibonacci sequence starts: 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13, ... F(1)=1, F(2)=1, F(k)=F(k-1)+F(k-2).
outputSpec: The sum of F(1) + F(2) + ... + F(n).

botCodes.code:
n = int(input())
a, b = 1, 1
total = 0
for _ in range(n):
    total += a
    a, b = b, a + b
print(total)

n = int(input())
fibs = [1, 1]
for i in range(2, n):
    fibs.append(fibs[-1] + fibs[-2])
print(sum(fibs[:n]))
